title: Your Supplements Weren't Checked Before You Bought Them
description: Under a 1994 law, the FDA cannot review dietary supplements for safety or accuracy before they hit shelves. Studies show 88% of melatonin gummies contain a different dose than the label states — one contained no melatonin at all, just undeclared CBD.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Your Supplements Weren't Checked Before You Bought Them
